community.title: Community
community.alreadyReportedDescription: You have already reported this content. Our moderators will review it.
community.deletePostConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The post and its comments will be permanently deleted.
community.subtitleGlobal: Connect with the entire platform community
community.noPostsMatchFilters: No posts match your current search/category/tag filters.
community.aiChampionsBlurb: Reach out to these team members for AI guidance and support.
community.postNotFoundDescription: This post may have been deleted or you don't have access.
community.commentsLocked: Comments are locked on this post.
community.ideaLibrarySubtitle: Browse AI and process improvement ideas from {{orgName}}
community.noIdeasMatchFilters: No ideas match your current filters.
community.noOrgIdeas: Please select an organization to view ideas.
community.noOrgSubmitIdea: Please select an organization to submit an idea.
community.noOrgResources: Please select an organization to view resources.
community.deleteIdeaDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this idea? This action cannot be undone.
community.noCommentsStartDiscussion: No comments yet. Start the discussion!
community.ideaNotFoundDescription: The idea you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access.
community.rejectionReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this idea was rejected...
community.resourceLibrarySubtitle: Helpful resources, templates, and guides from {{orgName}}
community.deleteResourceDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

ideaForm.subtitle: Share your AI or process improvement idea with {{orgName}}
ideaForm.whatsYourIdeaDescription: Start with a clear title and categorize your idea
ideaForm.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Automate invoice processing with AI
ideaForm.titleDescription: A short, descriptive title for your idea
ideaForm.businessAreaDescription: Which part of the business does this idea relate to?
ideaForm.tagsDescription: Add keywords to help others find this idea
ideaForm.currentStateDescription: Help us understand the current situation and why change is needed
ideaForm.currentProcessPlaceholder: Describe how things work today. What steps are involved? Who does what?
ideaForm.currentProcessDescription: Walk us through the current workflow or process
ideaForm.painPointsPlaceholder: What problems does this cause? Time wasted? Errors? Frustration?
ideaForm.painPointsDescription: Explain the impact and why this needs to change
ideaForm.proposedDescription: Describe your idea for how AI or automation could help
ideaForm.proposedImprovementPlaceholder: Describe your idea for improvement. How could AI or automation help? What would change?
ideaForm.proposedImprovementDescription: Explain your proposed solution or improvement
ideaForm.desiredProcessPlaceholder: How should the process work after the improvement? (Optional)
ideaForm.desiredProcessDescription: Paint a picture of the improved workflow
ideaForm.successMetricsPlaceholder: e.g., 50% time reduction, zero errors, faster turnaround
ideaForm.detailsDescription: Optional technical context that might help evaluate this idea
ideaForm.dataInputsPlaceholder: What data is involved? Where does it come from? (e.g., emails, PDFs, Excel files, ERP system)
ideaForm.systemsPlaceholder: e.g., SAP, Salesforce, SharePoint, custom apps
ideaForm.systemsDescription: Which software systems are part of this process?
ideaForm.constraintsPlaceholder: Any concerns, limitations, or risks to consider? (e.g., data privacy, compliance, budget)

postForm.title: Title
postForm.contentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts, questions, or resources...
postForm.locationPlaceholder: e.g., Zoom, Conference Room A, or full address
postForm.locationDescription: Physical location or virtual meeting platform
postForm.tagsDescription: Up to 5 tags to help others find your post

emptyState.postsDescription: Be the first to start a discussion! Share ideas, ask questions, or post resources.
emptyState.ideasDescription: Submit your first AI or process optimization idea to help improve workflows.
emptyState.draftsDescription: You don't have any draft ideas. Start a new idea and save it as a draft to continue later.
emptyState.commentsDescription: Be the first to share your thoughts on this post.
emptyState.resourcesDescription: Share helpful links, templates, and guides with your team.
emptyState.noMatches: No items match your current filters.

ideas.draftSaved: Draft saved! You can find it in the "My Drafts" tab of the Idea Library.
ideas.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. The draft will be permanently deleted.

orgSettings.title: Organization Settings
orgSettings.noOrgDescription: Select an organization to manage its settings.
orgSettings.combinedNote: Feature access is combined as: platform flag AND organization override.

orgDetail.loadFailedDescription: Something went wrong while loading this organization.
orgDetail.noMembersDescription: Add users to this organization to get started.
orgDetail.promoteDescription: <0>{{name}}</0> will be able to manage team members, view analytics, and control settings for {{org}}.
orgDetail.demoteDescription: <0>{{name}}</0> will lose admin privileges and only have access as a regular learner.
orgDetail.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete <0>{{name}}</0> and all associated data including memberships, invitations, enrollments, and progress records. This action cannot be undone.
orgDetail.inviteDialogDescription: Send an invitation email to join this organization.
orgDetail.addDialogDescription: Select an existing user and assign them a role in this organization.
orgDetail.slugHint: Used in URLs. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
orgDetail.seatLimitHint: Maximum number of users allowed. Leave empty for unlimited.

organizations.createDialogDescription: Add a new company to the platform.
organizations.seatLimitHint: Maximum number of users allowed. Leave empty for unlimited.
organizations.inviteEmailHint: An invite link will be created for this email.

enrollDialog.failedDescription: No courses could be enrolled. See the reasons below.

platformSettings.title: Platform Settings
platformSettings.subtitle: Branding, access and feature configuration for the whole platform.
platformSettings.loadFailedDescription: Settings were not loaded from the server, so editing is disabled to prevent overwriting saved values. Try again.

userAccess.defaultRoleNote: New users are always created as Learner. Elevated access is granted via explicit admin invitation flows.
userAccess.requireEmailVerificationHint: Users must verify their email before accessing the platform.
userAccess.allowSelfRegistrationHint: Allow users to sign up without an invitation.

email.notConfiguredWarning: SMTP is not configured — invitation emails will not be sent.
email.testFailedDescription: Unable to connect to SMTP server.

features.note: Disabling a feature here hides it for every organization, regardless of their overrides.
features.certificates_enabled_hint: Allow learners to earn certificates upon course completion.
features.analytics_enabled_hint: Show analytics dashboards to org admins.
features.community_enabled_hint: Enable community feed, ideas and moderation features.
features.course_reviews_enabled_hint: Allow learners to leave reviews on courses.

coursesManager.title: Course Manager
coursesManager.subtitle: Create courses and control which organizations can access them.
coursesManager.createDescription: Add a new course to the platform.
coursesManager.deleteIntro: This will permanently delete "{{title}}" and all associated data including:
coursesManager.accessInfoBody: Only published courses can be made accessible. Toggle the switch to enable or disable access for each organization. Learners will only see courses that are both published AND enabled for their organization.
coursesManager.noPublishedCoursesDescription: Publish a course first to manage access.
coursesManager.accessGrantedDescription: All published courses are now accessible to this organization.

courseEditor.title: Course Editor
courseEditor.deleteIntro: This will permanently delete "{{title}}" and all associated data including:
courseEditor.noModules: No modules yet. Add your first module to get started.
courseEditor.moduleDialogAddDescription: Create a new module for this course.
courseEditor.lessonDialogAddDescription: Add a new lesson to this module.
courseEditor.videoFileHint: Ingen filstørrelses-begrænsning. Videoer uploades direkte til Azure Cloud Storage.
courseEditor.quizSetupHintEdit: Save the lesson first, then use "Edit Quiz" to configure questions.
courseEditor.quizSetupHintCreate: Create the lesson first, then configure the quiz questions.
courseEditor.quizSetupSubhint: Learners will need to pass the quiz to complete this lesson.
